description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist white facade. The property features a spacious wooden deck that wraps around a rectangular swimming pool, complemented by sun loungers and outdoor seating. Tall palm trees and other landscaping elements, including a flowering tree and a small deciduous tree, enhance the outdoor area. A driveway leads to a garage attached to the side of the house, where a pickup truck is parked. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and views of the pool area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, swimming pool, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, pool, deck, and landscaping with palm trees and flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the house's flat roof and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, deck, sun loungers, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Backyard view with a clear look at the pool, outdoor dining area, sun loungers, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, flush door, and direct access from the driveway; no porch or decorative columns.
